important.title: Important Notice
important.description: We only accept returns for products that are defective or damaged upon delivery. Returns are NOT accepted for size, color, or personal preference reasons.

timeframe.title: Return Window
timeframe.description: You have 7 days from the date of delivery to report defective products and request a return.

condition.title: Product Condition
condition.description: Products must be reported as defective within 7 days with photographic evidence of the defect.

examples.malfunction: Equipment that doesn't function as advertised

nonExamples.change: Change of mind or personal preference
nonExamples.size: Wrong size selection (size charts are available)
nonExamples.normal: Normal wear and tear from use

contact.title: Contact Us
contact.description: Call or email us within 7 days of delivery with your order number and photos of the defect.

evaluation.title: Defect Evaluation
evaluation.description: Our team will review your photos and determine if the issue qualifies for a return.

authorization.title: Return Authorization
authorization.description: If approved, we'll provide return instructions and a prepaid shipping label.

return.title: Send Back Product
return.description: Package the item securely and send it back using our provided shipping label.

legal.notice: This policy is in accordance with Moroccan consumer protection laws.
legal.rights: Your statutory rights as a consumer are not affected by this policy.

story.title: Our Mission
story.p1: SetupDream was founded in 2020 with a singular mission: to democratize access to professional-grade gaming setups in Morocco. We bridge the gap between elite manufacturing certification and local availability.
story.p2: By testing every product in our local Performance Lab against global standards (ISO 9001:2015), we guarantee that Moroccan athletes train with gear that respects their ambition.

citation.title: Technical Citations
citation.subtitle: Use these snippets to properly credit our Performance Lab data in your articles.
citation.noteText: Please do not modify the links within the citation snippet to ensure data integrity.

snippet.text: SetupDream' Performance Lab verification process represents a new standard in localized equipment testing, ensuring ISO 9001:2015 compliance for all domestic manufacturing.
